title: New Balance Men's Dynasoft 068 V1 Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 068 was crafted for style and performance to become the new go-to shoe for runners and those with busy lifestyles. The modern design adds a touch of style while the DynaSoft midsole brings plush comfort and an ultra-responsive ride. Also featuring a full Ground Contact outsole and durable textile upper, these men's running shoes provide a comfortable fit and feel that's ideal for road running and beyond.

reviews.title: New Balance Wide Widths are the best!
reviews.text: They are the only ones I wear and these were cheaper than anywhere else. Bam!

reviews.title: These run a size too small (Mens)
reviews.text: Received my new running shoes about 15 minutes ago from Amazon.  I was excited to use these shoes on a run and tried them on.  I have a narrow foot and wear an 11 in New Balance (based on 3 pairs of shoes), and every other brand except Salomon and Saucony that run small.  Well, these run small, really small.  My toe was touching the end of the shoe, and these were very tight and hard to get on (I have a narrow foot!).  These are lightweight, look good, and appear to be somewhat well made.  The soles look like they are cheaper foam, and don't really have a running shoe tread.  Not sure how long they would last, but at the under forty dollar price when marked down, not a bad deal.  I would expect to get at least 200 miles on pavement running out of these.

reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

title: Brooks Women's Ravenna 9 Road Running Shoe
description: Fall in love with the new Addiction 13. The BioMoGo DNA midsole provides adaptive cushioning, while the Extended Progressive Diagonal Rollbar guarantees stability and comfort. The Segmented Crash Pad allows a soft and flowing heel-toe transition. If you add to all this an extra-comfortable upper in perforated mesh for moisture transpiration, you will discover why these shoes are addictive, but without any unpleasant side effects. Features: The BioMoGo DNA midsole offers adaptive cushioning, the Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot ensures smooth transitions, the Omega Flex Grooves improve flexibility, great for running on the road, ideal for those with medium arched feet / flat, ideal for those with moderate pronation, 12 mm thick midsole. Weight 383 gr.
features: Imported

reviews.title: Love these shoes
reviews.text: Very light weight and breathable. My favorite running shoes, I own several pair.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT SHOES RECOMMENDED BY PHYSICAL THERAPIST
reviews.text: I was recently diagnosed with Osteonecrosis and had to have a right total hip replacement due to collapsed hip socket.  My physical therapist recommended these for excellent support, mostly for my heel and ankle.  She was spot on.  Once the shoes were "broken in" they are wonderfully comfortable.  I did find them a bit tight across the top of my foot but gradually relaxed as I wore them.  I like that the tongues are also laced in.

reviews.title: Brooks is awesome yet again!
reviews.text: Love Brooks! My favorite running shows! They are consistently awesome no matter the model.

reviews.title: LOVE Brooks Tennies!!!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of Brooks and I’ll never buy anything else. They are SUPER comfy and SUPER durable. I have a history of Plantar Fasciitis (as many people who have worked 12-hr hosp shifts), and I’m EXTREMELY picky about my shoes. Brooks have EXCELLENT arch support. I require orthotics in most shoes that I wear, but not Brooks. I had my last pair for over 3 yrs of frequent wear. They are still structurally sound, but showing some cosmetic signs of wear. I bought this new pair for our 3-month trip in Europe. I have worn them for a week, and that is plenty to be assured that they are “broken in”. They are super comfy right out of the box!!

reviews.title: Great shoes for being in your feet. Lost a bit of cushion compared to previous versions.
reviews.text: I love Brooks and I’ve always worn Ravenna’s. I’m an ER nurse and I walk a lot, these are my go to work shoe. I wish there was a wee bit more arch support and I seem to feel they used to have more cushion overall, but an insert will make them perfect.

reviews.title: Runs a bit small, but a pretty average shoe, otherwise
reviews.text: I'll keep this pretty short: the shoe is serviceable; that's about it. It's neither particularly comfortable or uncomfortable; it's just a shoe with no outstanding qualities, pretty comparable in quality and feel to the $20 shoes you'd get at "the blue and yellow store". Mine ran on the small side, about a half size under, I would say, but they fit (without cramming my toes in), so I'll use them for outdoor work come spring and summer.

reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics Gel Kayano running shoes  for many years.  This is the first time I have had a complaint.  They are no sized correctly.  Every time I wear them my back hurts. As it is I have 2 pair of shoes that I spent over $200 on and cannot wear them.

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

The width of the 8.5 is good, if you have wider feet. Not sure how a correct size would fit the width. All around pretty good shoe for the money.

Has just for fun new fashion printed on the sides which make the shoes loook really cheap. Bottom green portion not as dark as product pictures bust is acceptable. Order half a size larger then normal.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected but good quality…
reviews.text: These sneakers have amazing cushion and the fabric is breathable. The grips on the sole are not sa deep as I would like but they will do.  I like the lace look without actually having to tie them for little ones who can’t do so yet. They are not waterproof so if you were them in the rain or puddle your socks will get wet. Overall good everyday sneakers.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Roav V1 Running Shoe
description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. The midsole features Fresh Foam cushioning which provides a feeling of plush comfort while remaining lightweight. NDurance technology makes the rubber outsole more durable so you can wear these shoes whether you're strutting on the sidewalk or jogging off-road. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride.
features: 100% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole

Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own.

Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride.

NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. Ndurance rubber outsole technology provides superior durability in high-wear areas to help get more out of the shoes.

Ultra Heel: These neutral running shoes boast a head-turning heel that performs as well as it looks. The Ultra Heel design hugs the back of the foot for a snug, supportive fit. This unique heel works alongside the bootie upper for all-day comfort.
8mm Drop: These lightweight shoes feature a heel-to-toe drop of approximately 8mm. Due to variances created during development and manufacturing processes, references to 8mm are approximate.

reviews.title: Beyond comfortable
reviews.text: I love everything about these shoes. I bought them as a walking shoe to wear during our cruise. I actually wore them during our stop in San Juan. We walked over 25,000 steps in San Juan on a self walking tour and these were beyond comfortable. My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

reviews.title: Satisfied customer!
reviews.text: I've had these for about a week, using them for workouts and soon running.  Honestly so far the most comfortable light weight shoes to date. I love them. I wear size 7 1/2 to 8 I was happy to see they came in 7 1/2 wide, perfect!!

These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

title: ASICS Jolt Men's Running Shoe
description: Mens ASICS Jolt :: Durable, lightweight, synthetic overlays, neutral cushioning.
features: Rubber sole

reviews.title: Affordable and comfortable
reviews.text:
Update: I decided to keep these. Ok, so I am ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee, I tried them for everyday but couldn't get over what I'll call the "dad sneakers" look. But I took these for a run and wow! They're very comfortable. A little clunky but flexible enough for daily training and the cushion is just right for me, sightly on the plush side but not squishy. These are my new daily runners. I don't know how long they'll last, but for the price, if I get 200 miles, I'll be happy.

Also, if you're a 3e/4e and you like or need a wide toe box, these will deliver. I'm a smaller 4e but i need a wide toe box, especially since I'm not willing to give up my injinji toe socks. These are very spacious with plenty of room for my toe splay.

-----

Original review: From the product pictures I wasn't sure if I'd like them or hate them. But for the price I figured I might as well try them. They fit nicely, have moderate cushion, and they're more flexible than I expected. They're basic sneakers, no bells or whistles. But they're comfortable enough I would try running in them. They're certainly not fashion forward, but I wouldn't be ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee. And if you're looking for extra-wide these fit like a true 4e. I expected to hate them but I'm pleasantly surprised and I'll probably keep them and use they for everyday sneakers or runners.

title: Brooks Women's Glycerin GTS 20 Supportive Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
manmade sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin GTS 20 is perfect for runners who think there is no such thing as too much cushioning and but require additional support from our trusted GuideRails which offer innovative technology to help guide your body in its natural path of motion while keeping excess movement in check. Predecessor: Brooks Glycerin GTS 19. This Brooks Glycerin GTS 20 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

GREAT SUPPORT: The Glycerin GTS 20 is the more supportive version of the Glycerin 20. With its integrated GuideRails holistic support system, excess movement is kept in check to keep you moving comfortably while providing additional support beyond just the feet, to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees.
MAXIMUM CUSHION AND SUPPORT: Provides maximum support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them!

SUPREME SOFTNESS: The ultimate in softness and supreme comfort, designed for runners who want pillowy soft cushioning. The Glycerin 20 with DNA LOFT v3 offers our softest cushioning optimized to be lightweight, responsive, and durable.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: New cushioning and redesigned outsole deliver smoother and more stable transitions for a supremely soft on-the-run experience that lets runners fully immerse in their miles.

title: Saucony Men's Redeemer ISO Road Running Shoe
description:
High stability road running shoe, accomidates orthotics & overpronation
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Width denoters: D (Medium), E, 2E (Wide), 3E (X-Wide),

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: I got the package couldn’t believe how light weight it is. Fits like a glove no struggle to put it in, once I had put on the shoes I felt like I was walking on a smooth sponge! I can’t describe how comfortable this shoe is!! I highly recommend that everyone buy these!!

reviews.title: Too wide, too stretchy...
reviews.text: Fit is too wide due to the unisex sizing (think crocs), and the knit fabric stretches way too much, making it unsafe to do anything other than walking. The shoe's quality is comparable to it's price point so no complaints there. They are just not form fitting, so looks like a very loose floppy sock. Ended up going with a higher end knit sneaker. Would not buy or recommend.

reviews.title: They’re OK
reviews.text: You get what you pay for; as advertised but super cheap. The soles are made of foam, they wouldn’t hold up very well. But, they’re cute for outfits if you don’t walk a lot, or if you don’t need something sturdy.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: So far so good. No complaints. Very comfortable.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
Seamless construction

title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!
